Notes: Single UPDATE contains an add_rr for an A RRset and a delete_rrset for the same owner/type; the server's intra-message handling order or conflict resolution is intentionally underspecified.

Steps.Description: Add flip.campus.edu. A and then delete the same RRset in one UPDATE, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: flip.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset remains, disappears, or the UPDATE was rejected.
